rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Test stage names must not share the same label as their parent stage; 'review-fix' and 'review' both emit 'kody:review', causing false-positive failures when validating label removal.","scope":"kody lifecycle labels"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When validating stage label removal, distinguish between 'label still present from current stage' vs 'label left over from a past stage'; the check must account for the label being legitimately re-add","scope":"kody label-progression test"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Kody lifecycle stages follow a strict sequence: planning → building → verifying → review → done; each stage adds its own label and removes the previous one.","scope":"kody lifecycle"}]}
